locale.label: Language
members.title: Team members
members.description: Invite collaborators (editor or viewer). Existing accounts are activated immediately.
prd.projectHasVersions: This project has {count} versions. Pick one above - Clarify and sharing use the version shown here.
prd.singleVersion: You are viewing the only PRD version for this project.
roadmap.tapToLearnMore: coming in v1, tap to learn more
roadmap.customProjectHelp: If you're in a hurry and want this built for your team as a custom project, reach out directly - we can scope it together.
common.name: Name
common.title: Title
projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Each project contains your product idea, clarification history, and PRD versions.
projects.emptyDescription: Create your first project to start the product clarification flow.
projects.dialogNewDescription: Describe the product idea you want to explore.
projects.journeyModeStandardHint: Full guided clarification through PRD and architecture.
projects.journeyModeExpressHint: Fast-track to a shareable deliverable with lighter clarification.
projects.importPrdHint: Paste or upload an existing PRD (.md or .txt). It becomes version 1 — no credits for import alone.
projects.importPastePlaceholder: Paste your PRD from ChatGPT, Notion, etc.
projects.importNoCredits: Import does not use credits. Clarify and generate still use your balance.
workspace.activePrdVersionTitle: Active PRD version in this workspace
workspace.journeyModeConfirmExpressBody: Express prioritizes a faster deliverable. You can still clarify, but the flow is lighter than Standard.
workspace.journeyModeConfirmStandardBody: Standard unlocks the full guided clarification path. Your existing work is kept.
workspace.journeyModeConfirmApprofondirB: Return to Standard for deeper clarification. Your PRD versions and history stay intact.
dashboard.startFirstProjectDescription: Open Projects to capture your idea and run guided clarification through to a PRD.
userStories.confirmSplitFirstDescription: User stories are anchored to clusters from a confirmed split. Finish and confirm the split for this PRD version, then return here.
userStoriesDetail.addOneStoryRequired: Add at least one story with title and description
featureSplit.noPrdContent: No PRD content found for this version
featureSplit.noFilledSections: No filled PRD sections to convert. Complete the PRD in the workspace first.
featureSplit.clustersLoaded: {count} clusters loaded from PRD sections - edit each field
featureSplit.aiTimeout: AI request timed out. Try again or shorten your PRD.
featureSplit.aiProviderNotConfigured: AI provider is not configured on this server.
featureSplit.prdNotReady: PRD is not ready for AI splitting
featureSplit.aiProposalLoaded: AI proposal loaded - review each cluster, then save as draft
featureSplit.addCompleteCluster: Add at least one complete cluster before saving
featureSplit.subtitle: Break your PRD into independently deliverable clusters.
featureSplit.prdNotReadyTitle: PRD not ready for AI split
featureSplit.valuePlaceholder: What user value does this cluster deliver?
featureSplit.boundaryPlaceholder: What does this cluster NOT include?
featureSplit.confirmedNextStep: Feature split confirmed. Generate user stories from your clusters next.
taskSplit.addOneTaskRequired: Add at least one task with title and prompt
taskSplit.aiTasksGenerated: AI tasks generated - review and save
taskSplit.templateTasksReady: Template tasks ready - review and save
taskSplit.bundleLocked: Bundle locked - ready for Delivery export
taskSplit.title: Test-first workflows
taskSplit.subtitle: Split each review-ready user story into ordered tasks with a Cursor-ready prompt per task.
taskSplit.noReviewReadyStoriesDescriptio: Finalize user stories and mark a cluster as review-ready before task splitting.
taskSplit.selectStoryDescription: One story at a time - only review-ready lines appear here.
taskSplit.lockedDescription: Locked for delivery - edits are disabled.
taskSplit.editFlowDescription: Generate, edit, save, then lock when ready.
architecture.phaseCheck.stable: PRD is stable, architecture phase is unlocked.
architecture.phaseCheck.prdNotStable: PRD is not stable. Complete all sections first.
architecture.phaseCheck.notIntake: Project is not in the intake phase.
architecture.phaseUnlock.noPrd: No PRD version found. Generate a PRD first.
architecture.lockedBody: The Architecture phase becomes available after you've clarified and stabilized your product definition. This ensures all decisions are made with full context.
architecture.scoreDescription: Stable PRD + core ADRs completed (workspace formula)
prd.emptyDescription: Go through the clarification flow and generate your first PRD version.
prd.downloadMarkdownTitle: Download this PRD version as Markdown
prd.refineTitle: Open a focused chat to refine this PRD
workspace.expressPostPrdNavHint: Not available in express mode. Use Approfondir to switch to standard and unlock the full post-PRD pipeline.
errors.loadProjectsHttp: Could not load projects (HTTP {status}). Try again.
errors.loadProjects: Could not load projects. Try again.
errors.loadYourProjectsHttp: Could not load your projects (HTTP {status}). Try again.
errors.loadYourProjects: Could not load your projects. Try again.
projects.deleteConfirm: Delete this project and all its PRDs? This cannot be undone.
common.feedbackPromptDescription: Quick feedback helps improve the experience.
clarify.idlePrompt: Chat is ready. Send a message to start without automatic calls.
clarify.expressModeBanner: Express mode: answer the minimum IA questions (vision, users, core features), then generate a lean 12-section livrable.
clarify.readyToGenerateExpressPrd: Minimum express clarification complete — you can generate the express livrable.
clarify.readyToGeneratePrd: Ready to generate PRD — every canonical section has had a question in this workspace.
clarify.inputPlaceholder: Type your response or add context...
clarify.generatePrdCost: 10 credits · Generates a versioned PRD from your clarifications
clarify.feedbackDescription: Your feedback helps improve the product clarification experience.
refine.signInRequired: You need to be signed in to refine
refine.title: Refine
refine.description: Copy, edit, or regenerate like ChatGPT. Then update the PRD.
refine.seedFromSectionWithContent: Can you clarify the section "{section}" based on this current content: {content}
refine.initialPlaceholder: What would you like to clarify?
settings.title: Account settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your profile, security, and privacy rights.
settings.securityDescription: Change your password and revoke other sessions.
settings.activeSessionsDescription: Revoke sessions you do not recognize.
settings.privacySectionDescription: Export and deletion of your personal data.
userStories.addOneStoryRequired: Add at least one story with title and description
userStories.selectClusterForGeneration: Select a cluster to generate, or tick clusters for batch
delivery.packageDownloaded: Package downloaded — unzip into your repo root and open in Cursor.
delivery.selectAtLeastOnePreview: Select at least one story bundle to preview.
delivery.selectAtLeastOneExport: Select at least one story bundle to export.
delivery.title: Cursor delivery
delivery.subtitleEnd: as a ZIP with WORK_QUEUE.md and per-story prompt files (PD-001).
delivery.noEligibleDescription: Delivery needs locked task-split bundles from test-first workflows. Complete user stories, generate tasks with prompts, then lock each bundle upstream.
delivery.selectBundlesDescription: Only locked, export-ready story bundles appear here. Default selection includes all eligible bundles.
delivery.previewReadonlyDescription: Ordered stories and task prompt excerpts — upstream content cannot be edited here.
delivery.afterDownloadDescription: Unzip the archive at your repository root. Open the folder in Cursor and start from WORK_QUEUE.md — story details live under docs/execution/user-stories/.
userStories.title: User stories
userStories.batchHelpText: Tick one or more clusters, then generate stories below. Click a cluster title to edit inline, or open its saved page from the sidebar or the link on each card.
userStories.batchGenerateHelp: Stories will be generated for the ticked clusters. Open a cluster above to preview and edit here.
userStories.readyToSplitHelp: Ready to split into tasks? Open task-split with all selected stories pre-loaded.
userStories.storyTemplatePlaceholder: As a … I want … so that …
questionHistory.prdNotLinked: PRD: not linked to a version
questionHistory.noStructuredOptions: No structured options on file for this entry.
questionHistory.signInRequired: You need to be signed in to view history.
questionHistory.invalidData: Received invalid data from the server. Try again or contact support.
questionHistory.networkError: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
questionHistory.emptyDescription: Structured decisions from clarification will appear here. Only you can see this log; it is not shown on shared links.
decision.notSureMessage: I'm not sure about this. Can you ask differently?
dashboard.homeBaseDescription: Your home base for turning ideas into a structured PRD. Open a project for feature split, user stories, task splitting, and Cursor delivery.
dashboard.prdPathDescription: Projects, clarification, and versioned PRDs are always available. Per project you can run feature split, user stories, task split (prompts per task), and Cursor package export.
dashboard.roadmapDescription: Upcoming capabilities we have not wired in the product UI yet — not broken links, just honest scope.
feedback.banner.prdCreatedDescription: If you have a moment, tell us how the generation flow worked for you.
feedback.banner.prdUpdatedDescription: Quick feedback on the update experience helps us improve.
feedback.banner.prdSharedDescription: How was sharing your PRD with stakeholders?
feedback.banner.prdViewedDescription: We would love a quick rating of the reading experience.
feedback.banner.defaultDescription: Share quick feedback if you would like.
feedback.modal.prdCreatedDescription: Your feedback helps improve the product clarification experience.
feedback.modal.prdSharedDescription: Your feedback helps improve sharing and collaboration.
feedback.modal.prdUpdatedDescription: Your feedback helps improve refinement and update flows.
feedback.modal.prdViewedDescription: Your feedback helps improve how PRDs are presented in the workspace.
